risk_title: High Political and Governance Risk Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Lebanon faces persistently high political and governance risks that constrain project implementation capacity and sustainability of health system strengthening efforts.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: Macroeconomic Crisis Impacting Project Disbursements and Operations
risk_summary: Lebanon's macroeconomic instability is creating implementation challenges, including currency fluctuations affecting disbursements and operational costs for health service delivery.

risk_title: Refugee and Host Community Service Delivery Pressures
risk_summary: Project targets refugee and host community vaccination and healthcare access amid displacement pressures, with indicators tracking Syrian and Palestinian refugee hospital utilization and vaccination rates.
evidence_quote: Percentage of residents of Lebanon who are fully vaccinated (Refugees and host communities)... Percentage of hospital visits by refugees (Syrians and Palestinians) in public hospitals which have benefited from project support

risk_title: Fragile Health System Capacity in Conflict-Affected Context
risk_summary: Project implementation depends on strengthening public hospital capacity in a fragile governance environment, with only 56% of hospitals currently equipped with priority pharmaceuticals and medical supplies against a 70% target.
evidence_quote: Percentage of public hospitals equipped with priority pharmaceuticals, medical equipment, and supplies (Percentage) 50 May/2022... 56 30-Dec-2024... 70 Dec/2025
